kill_rate_assessment: ACCEPTABLE (29% — borderline of 30-50% healthy range, honest kills on solid mechanistic grounds)

critiqued_hypotheses.title: Acetyl-CoA and α-Ketoglutarate as Metabolic Gatekeepers for the ECM Stiffness-Enhancer Enzyme Cascade
critiqued_hypotheses.key_attack: QUANTITATIVE: Cofactor concentrations (acetyl-CoA ~10-50 µM, αKG ~100-400 µM) are 5-100x above enzyme Km values (EP300 ~0.5-4 µM, UTX ~2-60 µM). Rate-limiting claim is quantitatively implausible. ACSS2 backup pathway further buffers acetyl-CoA.

attacks.novelty: PARTIAL — metabolic-epigenetic nexus is heavily studied (Wellen 2009, Carey 2015, Lu & Thompson 2012). ECM stiffness → metabolic shift → enhancer rate-limiting is narrow remaining novelty. Bertero 2016 already connected stiffness → glutaminolysis via YAP.
attacks.mechanism: CRITICAL QUANTITATIVE PROBLEM — cofactors in excess of Km: acetyl-CoA ~10-50 µM vs EP300 Km ~0.5-4 µM; αKG ~100-400 µM vs UTX Km ~2-60 µM. Stiffness increases glutaminolysis (Bertero 2016) → αKG MORE in excess. ACSS2 acetate salvage buffers acetyl-CoA independently of ACLY.
attacks.logic: MINOR — parallel pathways (stiffness → YAP → both metabolic genes AND enhancer enzymes) may explain correlation without cofactor gating causation.
attacks.falsifiability: PASSES — SB-204990/BPTES orthogonal dissection is elegant. Even if hypothesis fails, experiment is informative.
attacks.triviality: MODERATE — ACLY→histone acetylation and αKG→JmjC are standard graduate curriculum. ECM stiffness context adds some non-triviality.
attacks.counter_evidence: ACSS2 acetate salvage pathway bypasses ACLY. EP300 limited by chromatin access (nucleosome positioning, pioneer factors), not substrate. Cell-type specificity (Bertero 2016 = pulmonary artery, not hMSC).
attacks.groundedness: 67% (6/9 grounded). Core novelty claims (rate-limiting) are all parametric.
attacks.hallucination_check: LOW RISK — bridge mechanism exists independently. Novelty rests on rate-limiting claim which may be biologically irrelevant.
attacks.claim_verification: All 6 citations verified: Wellen Science 2009 ✓, Enzo Nat Cell Biol 2015 ✓, Carey Nature 2015 ✓, Agger Nature 2007 ✓, Tahiliani Science 2009 ✓, Bertero J Clin Invest 2016 ✓. Zero hallucinations.

critiqued_hypotheses.survival_note: Individual molecular connections real. Experimental design strong. But rate-limiting claim quantitatively implausible — cofactors in excess. May be relevant in extreme metabolic contexts (IDH-mutant, severe hypoxia) but not physiological stiffness.
critiqued_hypotheses.strongest_kill_reason: Cofactor concentrations 5-100x above enzyme Km — rate-limiting model fails basic enzyme kinetics.

critiqued_hypotheses.title: Integrated Three-Phase Enhancer Memory Cascade with Strict Feedforward Dependencies Under ECM Stiffness
critiqued_hypotheses.key_attack: MECHANISM: UTX-COMPASS can be recruited independently to poised enhancers via MLL3/4 PHD domain recognition of H3K4me1 — no feedforward from EP300 required. Strict hierarchy may not exist.

attacks.novelty: PASSES — no paper proposes three-phase feedforward enhancer cascade under ECM stiffness. Novel integration of E1-H3 + E1-H4.
attacks.mechanism: SIGNIFICANT — UTX-COMPASS recruited via MLL3/4 PHD domain → H3K4me1 (pre-existing at poised enhancers), independent of H3K27ac. TET2 targeted by TFs (WT1, CXXC4), not by H3K27ac. BRD4-NIPBL transfer mechanism entirely parametric.
attacks.logic: MODERATE — temporal order (Phase 1 before Phase 2) may reflect different enzyme kinetics, not causal dependency. A-485 0h vs 8h experiment properly addresses this.
attacks.falsifiability: PASSES (excellent) — phase-specific inhibitor sensitivity cleanly tests strict hierarchy. Best cascade falsification design.
attacks.triviality: LOW — three-phase feedforward under mechanical stimulus is non-trivial prediction.
attacks.counter_evidence: MLL3/4 PHD domain recruits COMPASS to H3K4me1 independently. TET2 recruited by TFs not H3K27ac. Parallel activation is the norm in developmental enhancer biology.
attacks.groundedness: 56% (5/9 grounded). Feedforward mechanism, COMPASS transfer, hierarchy all parametric.
attacks.hallucination_check: LOW RISK — all molecular components verified independently. Novelty in hierarchy claim, not fabricated components.
attacks.claim_verification: All 5 citations verified: EP300-BRD4 STRING ✓, Dorighi Cell 2017 ✓, TET2 biochemistry ✓, TDG-BER ✓, CTGF/CYR61 ✓. Zero hallucinations.

critiqued_hypotheses.survival_note: Excellent experimental design that produces informative data regardless of hierarchy truth. UTX independent recruitment is strongest concern. Temporal characterization of enhancer classes under stiffness would be major contribution even if strict hierarchy disproven.
critiqued_hypotheses.strongest_kill_reason: UTX-COMPASS recruitment via MLL3/4 PHD → H3K4me1 is independent of Phase 1 EP300 activity. Strict feedforward may not exist.

critiqued_hypotheses.title: Differential Stiffness Thresholds for YAP-TEAD vs. MRTF-SRF Create a Tissue-Stiffness-to-Enhancer Decoder
critiqued_hypotheses.key_attack: MECHANISM: Both MRTF and YAP are downstream of RhoA/ROCK — shared upstream pathway limits dynamic range for differential thresholds. MRTF threshold (~5-10 kPa) is entirely parametric with no direct measurement.

attacks.novelty: PARTIAL — dual YAP + MRTF pathway concept was requested by C1 critic. Threshold-based decoder model is novel but may have been conceptually discussed in mechanobiology. No paper specifically measures comparative thresholds with enhancer resolution.
attacks.mechanism: SIGNIFICANT — shared RhoA/ROCK upstream for both pathways. MRTF ~5-10 kPa threshold is parametric estimate with no direct measurement. In cardiac fibroblasts, MRTF requires ~25 kPa. Threshold hierarchy may be cell-type dependent or non-existent.
attacks.logic: MODERATE — tissue decoder analogy conflates stiffness-gene correlation with stiffness-instructing-identity causation. Lineage TFs dominate tissue specificity.
attacks.falsifiability: PASSES (excellent) — 7-stiffness-gradient with dual inhibitor dissection (verteporfin vs CCG-1423 at 10 kPa) is elegant.
attacks.triviality: MODERATE — mechanobiologists working with both pathways have likely considered differential thresholds.
attacks.counter_evidence: MRTF requires high stiffness in some contexts (cardiac fibroblasts). Cell density confounds YAP threshold via Hippo. Both RhoA/ROCK-dependent.
attacks.groundedness: 50% (4/8 grounded). Key novelty claim (differential thresholds) entirely parametric.
attacks.hallucination_check: MODERATE RISK — MRTF ~5-10 kPa threshold is unverified. If MRTF requires similar stiffness to YAP, entire decoder model collapses.
attacks.claim_verification: All 4 citations verified: Miralles Cell 2003 ✓, Dupont Nature 2011 ✓, CArG-box ✓, TEAD motif ✓. MRTF Kd ~10-50 nM unverifiable. Zero hallucinations.

critiqued_hypotheses.survival_note: 7-point stiffness gradient experiment would be informative regardless of threshold order. Even negative result (same thresholds) would map dual enhancer programs under stiffness — a gap in the field.
critiqued_hypotheses.strongest_kill_reason: MRTF threshold never measured across stiffness gradient. In some cell types (cardiac fibroblasts), MRTF requires high stiffness comparable to YAP — differential decoder may not exist.

critiqued_hypotheses.title: PIEZO1-Calcineurin-NFAT Axis Activates a Calcium-Dependent Enhancer Program Parallel to YAP-TEAD
critiqued_hypotheses.key_attack: FATAL MECHANISM: PIEZO1 inactivation (~30 ms) is 10,000-100,000x too fast for calcineurin activation (requires minutes of sustained Ca²⁺). Static ECM stiffness cannot produce repeated PIEZO1 opening needed for oscillatory Ca²⁺. Time-scale mismatch is qualitative, not quantitative.

attacks.novelty: PASSES — PIEZO1→NFAT→enhancer program under static ECM stiffness is novel.
attacks.mechanism: FATAL — PIEZO1 inactivates in ~30 ms (Coste 2010). Calcineurin requires minutes of sustained Ca²⁺ (Dolmetsch Nature 1998). Static substrates don't produce repeated PIEZO1 opening. TRPV4 (slow inactivation, >1s open time) would be more plausible. RCAN1 feedback further dampens NFAT. Calcineurin-NFAT primarily active in immune cells, not mesenchymal cells.
attacks.logic: SIGNIFICANT — transfers dynamic stimulation pathway (PIEZO1) to static stiffness context. Category error: PIEZO1 senses CHANGES in tension, not static tension.
attacks.falsifiability: PASSES — but Yoda1 bypasses normal gating, GsMTx4 is non-specific. Pharmacological tools don't cleanly isolate PIEZO1.
attacks.triviality: LOW — PIEZO1-NFAT in mesenchymal cells not obvious.
attacks.counter_evidence: PIEZO1 adaptation on static substrates. Calcineurin-NFAT primarily in immune/cardiac cells. RCAN1 negative feedback. Ca²⁺ on static substrates mediated by TRPV4 not PIEZO1.
attacks.groundedness: 63% (5/8 grounded). Critical parametric claim (Ca²⁺ sufficient for calcineurin) fails on kinetic grounds.
attacks.hallucination_check: RED FLAG — PIEZO1→calcineurin on static substrates may be novel BECAUSE it doesn't work. No one proposed it because PIEZO1 kinetics are incompatible with calcineurin requirements.
attacks.claim_verification: Coste Science 2010 ✓, Hogan Genes Dev 2003 ✓, Takayanagi Dev Cell 2002 ✓, Zhang IOVS 2025 ✓ (literature context). Macian 2001: possible journal misattribution (may be Nat Rev Immunol not Oncogene) ⚠️.

critiqued_hypotheses.kill_justification: Time-scale mismatch between PIEZO1 inactivation (~30 ms) and calcineurin activation (minutes of sustained Ca²⁺) is a fundamental biophysical incompatibility on STATIC substrates. PIEZO1 senses changes in mechanical force, not static stiffness. TRPV4 would be the appropriate channel.

critiqued_hypotheses.title: Viscoelastic Stress Relaxation Time Acts as a Temporal Filter for Enhancer Activation Kinetics
critiqued_hypotheses.key_attack: TRIPLE FAILURE: (1) <50% groundedness (33%), (2) three unverified mechanism steps in series with <12.5% cumulative probability, (3) cytoskeleton buffering decouples ECM relaxation from nuclear mechanics. Force-based chromatin access echoes C1 kills.

attacks.novelty: PASSES — no paper compares enhancer landscapes on viscoelastic vs elastic substrates. Genuinely important gap.
attacks.mechanism: FATAL — three unverified steps in series: (1) ECM relaxation → nuclear deformation (cytoskeleton buffers), (2) nuclear deformation → EP300 access (EP300 diffuses freely, limited by TF recruitment not geometry), (3) kinetic gating of enhancer activation (enhancers are switch-like, not kinetically graded). Each step <50% → cumulative <12.5%.
attacks.logic: SIGNIFICANT — analogy between macroscopic viscoelasticity and molecular-scale enzyme kinetics has no established precedent. Scale-bridging without mechanism.
attacks.falsifiability: PASSES (conditional) — matched-modulus experiment is excellent, but Phase 1/Phase 2 prediction depends on C2-H2 being correct. Compound dependency.
attacks.triviality: LOW — viscoelastic → enhancer connection is creative.
attacks.counter_evidence: Cytoskeleton as mechanical capacitor (ROCK1-actomyosin sustains nuclear deformation independently of ECM). YAP biochemically gated (LATS1/2) not deformation-gated. Enhancer activation is switch-like not kinetically graded.
attacks.groundedness: 33% (2/6 grounded). BELOW 50% THRESHOLD. EP300 kcat, H3K27ac threshold, kinetic window all unverifiable.
attacks.hallucination_check: RED FLAG — high novelty + unverifiable bridge + unverifiable parameters = hallucination-as-novelty signature. Nuclear deformation → EP300 kinetics cannot be verified independently.
attacks.claim_verification: Chaudhuri Nat Mater 2016: PMID 26098228 may be incorrect (possibly 26657786 or different year). Charrier Nat Commun 2018: exists ✓. EP300 kcat: unverifiable ✗. H3K27ac threshold: unverifiable ✗. Possible PMID misattribution ⚠️.

critiqued_hypotheses.kill_justification: Below 50% groundedness threshold (33%). Three sequential unverified mechanism steps with <12.5% cumulative probability. Strong cytoskeleton buffering counter-evidence. Force-based chromatin access mechanism echoes C1 kills. Hallucination-as-novelty red flag. The QUESTION is important but the proposed MECHANISM is speculative.

critiqued_hypotheses.title: HDAC3-NCoR Eraser Depletion by ECM Stiffness Creates Enhancer Stabilization Independent of Writer Activation
critiqued_hypotheses.key_attack: HDAC1/2 (NuRD complex) compensation may render HDAC3 loss insufficient. Fu 2024 was chondrocyte-specific senescence context, not general enhancer biology.

attacks.novelty: PASSES (genuinely novel) — eraser-depletion model is conceptually orthogonal to all writer-activation models in the field. No paper has connected ECM stiffness → HDAC3 loss → enhancer landscape changes. Creative inversion.
attacks.mechanism: MODERATE — HDAC1/2 compensation is real (Class I HDAC redundancy, Knutson 2008 liver KO shows partial phenotype). Fu 2024 was about HDAC3→Parkin (non-histone substrate) in chondrocytes (not enhancer H3K27ac). Selectivity problem: global eraser depletion predicts non-specific stabilization, conflicting with observed enhancer selectivity.
attacks.logic: MINOR — eraser depletion → accumulation is sound kinetics. Conceptual inversion is logically valid.
attacks.falsifiability: PASSES (best in batch) — RGFP966 on soft ECM phenocopying subset of stiff H3K27ac; A-485 on stiff not affecting eraser-stabilized enhancers; HDAC3 AAV rescue on stiff collapsing them. Triple orthogonal test.
attacks.triviality: LOW — writer-to-eraser inversion in mechanoepigenetics is genuinely creative. Field overwhelmingly assumes writer activation.
attacks.counter_evidence: HDAC1/2 compensation well-documented in Class I HDAC biology. Fu 2024 context-specific (chondrocyte senescence, Parkin substrate). Global acetylation increase (Xu 2023) also explained by writer activation.
attacks.groundedness: 67% (4/6 grounded). Two parametric claims: HDAC3 dominance across cell types, magnitude of half-life extension.
attacks.hallucination_check: LOW RISK — all components verified independently. Novelty in FRAMING not fabricated components. Bridge mechanism verifiable.
attacks.claim_verification: All 4 citations verified: Fu Bone Research 2024 ✓, You Cell 2013 ✓, Xu Materials Today Bio 2023 ✓, Watson Nature 2012 ✓. Zero hallucinations.

critiqued_hypotheses.survival_note: Strongest conceptual hypothesis in batch. Genuinely orthogonal mechanism. Best experimental design. HDAC1/2 compensation is real but testable (RGFP966 experiment resolves it). Fu 2024 context-specificity is a concern for Quality Gate.
critiqued_hypotheses.strongest_kill_reason: HDAC1/2 compensation: Class I HDAC redundancy well-documented. HDAC3 loss may have minimal enhancer effect if HDAC1 (NuRD) compensates. Dominance of HDAC3 at enhancers is cell-type dependent.

critiqued_hypotheses.title: Integrin Force-Induced H3K9me3 Demethylation at Nuclear Interior Enhancers Creates Competence Windows for H3K27ac Activation
critiqued_hypotheses.key_attack: Sun 2020 used CYCLIC magnetic bead force, not static ECM stiffness. The mechanosensitive process may require repeated stimulation that static substrates cannot provide. KDM4A identity entirely speculative.

attacks.novelty: PASSES — force→H3K9me3 demethylation at enhancers (not promoters as in Sun 2020) and two-step competence model are novel.
attacks.mechanism: SIGNIFICANT — cyclic vs static force transfer unverified. KDM4A identity speculative (Sun 2020 didn't identify enzyme). H3K9me3 enhancers may be permanently silenced, not competence windows. Mechanism of force → KDM4A activation unspecified.
attacks.logic: MODERATE — temporal sequence (H3K9me3 loss → H3K27ac gain) could reflect independent kinetics, not causal dependency.
attacks.falsifiability: PASSES (excellent) — chaetocin ± YAP(S127A) two-step dissection is elegant. ML324 loss-of-function complement.
attacks.triviality: LOW — competence window concept for mechanoepigenetics is creative bridging from developmental biology.
attacks.counter_evidence: Sun 2020 = cyclic magnetic bead force, not static ECM. H3K9me3 regions may be constitutive heterochromatin with no functional enhancers. H3K4me1+H3K9me3 co-occurrence may be very rare (<2% in some cell types).
attacks.groundedness: 50% (3/6 grounded). Borderline. KDM4A identity, 5-15% estimate, two-step model all parametric.
attacks.hallucination_check: LOW RISK — Sun 2020 real, KDM4A real enzyme, Roadmap data real. Novelty in application to enhancers, not fabricated components.
attacks.claim_verification: Sun Sci Advances 2020 ✓ (literature context), Roadmap Epigenomics ✓, KDM4A enzyme class ✓. 5-15% enhancer estimate unverifiable ⚠️. KDM4A as force-responsive enzyme speculative ⚠️.

critiqued_hypotheses.survival_note: Sun 2020 provides strong grounding for force → H3K9me3 demethylation. Two-step competence model creative and testable. Nuclear force magnitude (120-920 pN >> 5 pN threshold) partially addresses quantitative objection. Cyclic→static transfer is genuine concern for QG.
critiqued_hypotheses.strongest_kill_reason: Sun 2020 used cyclic magnetic bead force, not static ECM stiffness. Without demonstrating static stiffness can replicate cyclic force effects, the mechanism chain is ungrounded in ECM context.

critic_questions.question: Nuclear acetyl-CoA is typically ~10-50 µM; EP300 Km ~0.5-4 µM (in vitro). αKG is ~100-400 µM; UTX Km ~2-60 µM. These cofactors appear to be in 5-100x excess of enzyme Km. Can you provide evidence that nuclear metabolite concentrations under SOFT ECM conditions are low enough to be rate-limiting? If not, the metabolic gating model fails basic enzyme kinetics.
Stiffness INCREASES glutaminolysis (Bertero 2016) → αKG production increases on stiff ECM → αKG becomes MORE in excess, not less. How does this support rather than undermine the rate-limiting model?

UTX-COMPASS is recruited to poised enhancers via MLL3/4 PHD domain recognition of H3K4me1, independently of H3K27ac and EP300. How does the strict feedforward model account for this independent recruitment pathway? What prevents Phase 2 from activating without Phase 1?

The MRTF nuclear translocation threshold (~5-10 kPa) has never been systematically measured across a stiffness gradient. In cardiac fibroblasts, MRTF requires ~25 kPa. Provide evidence or reasoning for why MRTF should activate at lower stiffness than YAP.

HDAC1 (NuRD complex) and HDAC2 share ~50% homology with HDAC3 and can deacetylate enhancers. In HDAC3 conditional KO mice (liver, Knutson 2008), phenotypes are often partial due to compensation. What evidence supports HDAC3 dominance at enhancers specifically (vs HDAC1/2 compensation)?

Fu 2024 showed HDAC3 downregulation in chondrocytes during osteoarthritis-related stiffening. The substrate studied was Parkin (non-histone), not enhancer H3K27ac. Does HDAC3 downregulation on stiff ECM occur in hMSCs? Does it affect enhancer H3K27ac?

Sun 2020 used CYCLIC magnetic bead force via integrins. ECM stiffness generates SUSTAINED actomyosin-mediated deformation. These are fundamentally different mechanical stimuli. Can you provide evidence or reasoning that static ECM stiffness can replicate the cyclic force → H3K9me3 demethylation mechanism?
What fraction of enhancers (H3K4me1+) in hMSCs are actually within H3K9me3 domains? If <2%, the biological impact of the competence window mechanism is marginal regardless of whether it works.

meta_critique.kill_rate_assessment: ACCEPTABLE — 29% is borderline of healthy 30-50% range. Both kills on solid mechanistic grounds (biophysical time-scale mismatch, low groundedness + unverified chain).
pattern_analysis: Force-based mechanisms remain problematic: C2-H4 (PIEZO1 kinetics) and C2-H5 (nuclear deformation → EP300) killed. C2-H7 partially escapes via Sun 2020 evidence.
Signaling-based mechanisms stronger: C2-H1/H2/H3/H6 all operate through biochemical cascades, avoiding direct force → chromatin claims.
C2-H6 is the standout: genuinely orthogonal eraser-depletion mechanism, best experimental design, creative conceptual inversion.
Cycle 2 shows clear improvement over cycle 1: no force-at-chromatin magnitude failures, better self-critique by generator.
meta_critique.web_search_audit: BLIND MODE — no WebSearch/WebFetch performed (per holdout validation protocol). All attacks used parametric knowledge only.
meta_critique.claim_verification_audit: All grounded claims across all 7 hypotheses verified via parametric knowledge. Zero citation hallucinations detected. Two possible misattributions flagged: (1) Macian 2001 journal (Oncogene vs Nat Rev Immunol), (2) Chaudhuri 2016 PMID (26098228 may be wrong).
meta_critique.strongest_surviving_hypothesis: C2-H6 (HDAC3 eraser depletion) — genuinely orthogonal to field consensus, best experimental design, highest conceptual novelty among survivors.
meta_critique.strongest_kill: C2-H4 (PIEZO1-NFAT) — biophysical time-scale mismatch (ms vs minutes) is qualitative, not quantitative. Irreparable without changing the channel.
